definition.name: self-adjoint-part
definition.definition: def-self-adjoint-part (definitions/def-self-adjoint-part.md). For a finite-dim complex Hilbert space H, B(H)_sa={x in B(H): x=x*} is the real vector space of self-adjoint operators with the operator norm. For a in B(H)_sa, a>=0 iff every eigenvalue >=0; this order has unit 1. Here B_sa=(Im Ftilde)_sa = the self-adjoint part of the eps-C* algebra B; since Ftilde(X^dag)=Ftilde(X)^dag, B is *-closed and B_sa={X in B: X=X^dag} is a real subspace of B(H)_sa, inheriting the order and unit.
